title: Positive flow: Navigate to Hoodle Score screen
test_steps: Open the Holaa app. | Navigate to the 'Profile' section.
expected_result: The 'Hoodle Score' screen is displayed. | The header shows a green bar with a back arrow and the title 'Hoodle'. | The title 'My Hoodle Score' and subtitle 'Holaa app's score based on mobile usage' are visible. | The date range 'Dec 19, 2016 - Recently' is displayed. | The circular gauge showing the user's score distribution is visible. | The category labels 'The Listener,' 'Silent Monk,' 'Sweet Talker,' 'The Speaker,' and 'The Chatterbox' are visible. | The text 'You are 'The Listener'' is displayed. | The 'Share and tag friends to know their scores' text is visible. | The Facebook share icon is visible.

title: Negative flow: No internet connection
preconditions: Ensure there is no internet connection.
test_steps: Open the Holaa app. | Navigate to the 'Profile' section. | Simulate no internet connection.
expected_result: The 'Hoodle Score' screen is displayed, but the circular gauge and category labels are not visible. | The text 'You are 'The Listener'' is displayed. | The 'Share and tag friends to know their scores' text is visible. | The Facebook share icon is visible.

title: Boundary validation: Empty date range
test_steps: Open the Holaa app. | Navigate to the 'Profile' section.
expected_result: The 'Hoodle Score' screen is displayed. | The header shows a green bar with a back arrow and the title 'Hoodle'. | The title 'My Hoodle Score' and subtitle 'Holaa app's score based on mobile usage' are visible. | The date range 'Dec 19, 2016 - Recently' is displayed. | The circular gauge showing the user's score distribution is visible. | The category labels 'The Listener,' 'Silent Monk,' 'Sweet Talker,' 'The Speaker,' and 'The Chatterbox' are visible. | The text 'You are 'The Listener'' is displayed. | The 'Share and tag friends to know their scores' text is visible. | The Facebook share icon is visible.

title: Toggle state: Circular gauge visibility
test_steps: Open the Holaa app. | Navigate to the 'Profile' section. | Simulate a toggle to hide the circular gauge.
expected_result: The 'Hoodle Score' screen is displayed. | The header shows a green bar with a back arrow and the title 'Hoodle'. | The title 'My Hoodle Score' and subtitle 'Holaa app's score based on mobile usage' are visible. | The date range 'Dec 19, 2016 - Recently' is displayed. | The circular gauge showing the user's score distribution is not visible. | The category labels 'The Listener,' 'Silent Monk,' 'Sweet Talker,' 'The Speaker,' and 'The Chatterbox' are visible. | The text 'You are 'The Listener'' is displayed. | The 'Share and tag friends to know their scores' text is visible. | The Facebook share icon is visible.

title: Clickable button: Social share button
test_steps: Open the Holaa app. | Navigate to the 'Profile' section. | Click on the Facebook share icon.
expected_result: The Facebook share dialog is displayed.
